'''Haashimut''' was an [[Outer Rim Territories/Legends|Outer Rim]] [[Planet/Legends|planet]]. It was a [[Galactic Republic/Legends|Republic]] [[Fortress world/Legends|fortress world]] colonized c. [[24,000 BBY]] from which the [[Jedi/Legends|Jedi]] kept a watchful eye on the hostile [[Tion Cluster/Legends|Tion Cluster]] from their stronghold there.

{{Planet-stub}}
